text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Immigration Detention Centers 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HOMELAND SECURITY US IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT ICE ERO DETENTION, REMOVALS AND INFORMATION LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on people in US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detention, including a search tool to locate detainees and detention facilities.
